acceptance_criteria: Mapped deterministic route executes allowlisted step and returns canonical success envelope for stable fixture inputs
quality_guards: Integration test uses shared driver_flow_harness without duplicate bootstrap setup
Route mapping is loaded from manifest metadata and executed through deterministic run_step semantics

test_runs.command: .venv/bin/python scripts/speckit_implement_gate.py validate-task-evidence --task-kind integration --tests-passed pass --live-check-exit 0 --state-safety pass --transaction-integrity na --async-safety pass --observability pass --json
